metadata.title: Turun Thermohuolto Oy — Refrigeration, heaters & air conditioning
metadata.description: Installation, repair and maintenance of vehicle refrigeration units, auxiliary heaters and air conditioning systems. 24/7 on-call service. Lieto, Finland.

hero.tagline: Specialists in vehicle refrigeration units, auxiliary heaters and air conditioning systems in Lieto — over 20 years of experience.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional installation, repair and maintenance for all brand refrigeration units, heaters and air conditioning systems.

brands.title: Brands We Represent
brands.subtitle: We sell, install and service equipment from leading manufacturers.

about.label: Company
about.title: Our Story
about.description: Turun Thermohuolto Oy specializes in the installation, repair and maintenance of vehicle refrigeration units. We operate as an authorized refrigeration equipment retailer and provide government-mandated testing and calibration services.
about.milestone1: Company founded in Turku, Oriketo district
about.milestone2: Relocated to current facilities in Lieto, Tuulissuo area
about.milestone3: 20th anniversary — over two decades of expertise

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: Professional service process from start to finish.
process.step1Desc: Reach out by phone or form. We'll assess your needs.
process.step2Desc: We evaluate the equipment condition and required actions.
process.step3Desc: Professional installation, repair or maintenance on schedule.
process.step4Desc: We provide continuous support and round-the-clock on-call service.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Our skilled professionals are here to help you.

quality.title: Quality & Reliability
quality.subtitle: High quality is the foundation of our operations.
quality.standardsDesc: Our management systems meet international testing and calibration laboratory requirements.
quality.service247Desc: Round-the-clock on-call service ensures you get help even in urgent situations.
quality.trainingDesc: We continuously invest in staff training and maintaining professional expertise.
quality.reportingDesc: We deliver error-free, timely products and services backed by a comprehensive reporting system.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are happy to tell you more about our services.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you for your message! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: Specialists in vehicle refrigeration units, auxiliary heaters and air conditioning systems in Lieto, Finland.

servicesPage.title: Our Services
servicesPage.subtitle: We offer professional installation, repair and maintenance for all brand refrigeration units, heaters and air conditioning systems.
servicesPage.refrigerationDesc: Your cold chain unbroken — maintenance and repair for all branded units.
servicesPage.heatingDesc: Webasto and Eberspächer heater sales, installation, maintenance and repair.
servicesPage.acDesc: AC system installation, maintenance and repair for all vehicle types.
servicesPage.electricalDesc: Waste compactors, tailgates and electrical work.
servicesPage.atpDesc: Official seasonal inspection for food transport vehicles.
servicesPage.bioDesc: Lumikko bio-refrigeration unit sales and service.
servicesPage.agricultureDesc: Refrigeration and heating for agricultural machinery.
servicesPage.vulcanDesc: Aluminum AC pipe repair without disassembly.

referencesPage.title: References
referencesPage.subtitle: We have completed hundreds of refrigeration, heating and air conditioning installations across various vehicle types.
referencesPage.boatsDesc: Heater installation, repair and maintenance for boats and motorhomes. Webasto and Eberspächer heaters.
referencesPage.refrigerationDesc: Refrigeration unit installation, repair and maintenance for frozen transport. Thermo King, Carrier, Lumikko.
referencesPage.bioDesc: Lumikko bio-refrigeration unit sales and service. Energy-efficient solutions for food transport.
referencesPage.tractorsDesc: Refrigeration and heating equipment installation and service for agricultural and industrial machinery.
referencesPage.vehiclesDesc: Air conditioning service and repair for passenger and commercial vehicles. R-1234YF refrigerant.

companyPage.title: Company
companyPage.subtitle: Turun Thermohuolto Oy — reliable service since 2004.
companyPage.historyP1: We started operations on March 1, 2004 in the Oriketo district of Turku. Our specialty is vehicle air conditioning systems, refrigeration units and auxiliary heaters.
companyPage.historyP2: Today we operate from our facilities in Tuulissuo, Lieto, completed in autumn 2010.
companyPage.historyP3: On March 1, 2024, we celebrated our 20th anniversary. Warm thanks to all our customers for their trust and loyalty!
companyPage.missionP1: Turun Thermohuolto Oy is a refrigeration company specializing in the installation, repair and maintenance of vehicle refrigeration units, also serving as a distribution point for equipment.
companyPage.missionP2: As authorized by the authorities, we perform testing and calibration activities for transport containers of perishable goods.
companyPage.qualityP1: Customer needs and service are key development areas. We maintain competence to international testing and calibration laboratory standards.
companyPage.staffP1: Our staff is committed to following operational guidelines and maintaining their professional skills. Continuous training is everyone's responsibility.
companyPage.milestone2: Move to new facilities in Tuulissuo, Lieto

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.subtitle: We represent and sell leading refrigeration, heater and air conditioning brands.
productsPage.usedEquipmentDesc: We occasionally have used refrigeration units and spare parts available. Ask about availability!
productsPage.pipeRepairDesc: Air conditioning pipe repair using the VULCAN Lockring method. Repair of rear evaporator pipes in vans and minibuses without removing pipes from the chassis.

thermohuolto-20v.title: Turun Thermohuolto Celebrates 20 Years
thermohuolto-20v.excerpt: Turun Thermohuolto Oy celebrated its 20th anniversary on March 1, 2024. Warm thanks to all customers for their trust!

veneiden-lammitinasennukset.title: Boat Heater Installations Before the Season
veneiden-lammitinasennukset.excerpt: The upcoming boating season is on the horizon! We offer heater installations and maintenance for all sizes of motor and sailing boats.

ilmastointihuolto-korjaus.title: Air Conditioning Maintenance & Repair
ilmastointihuolto-korjaus.excerpt: Summer is coming and so is the need for AC. Expert leak detection and repairs with solid experience.

lisalammittimien-syyshuollot.title: Autumn Heater Maintenance
lisalammittimien-syyshuollot.excerpt: Autumn has truly arrived — now is the right time to check your auxiliary heater's function.

el-kori-elli-60v.title: EL-Kori Oy's 60th Anniversary Tour
el-kori-elli-60v.excerpt: The first stop of the tour was held at our location in Lieto.

auto-veneilmastoinnit.title: Vehicle & Boat Air Conditioning
auto-veneilmastoinnit.excerpt: Remember your vehicle's AC maintenance needs as spring arrives — before the rush.

eberi-lampopaivat.title: Eberspächer Heating Days
eberi-lampopaivat.excerpt: The importer's representative showcases new products in the heating equipment range.

alumiinisten-putkien-korjaus.title: Aluminum AC Pipe Repair
alumiinisten-putkien-korjaus.excerpt: New service: AC pipe repair using the VULCAN Lockring method without removing pipes.

konvekta-yhteistyo.title: Konvekta AC Maintenance Partnership
konvekta-yhteistyo.excerpt: Partnership agreement with MuiCon Oy for bus AC maintenance and repairs.
